{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211221485C6A170E54308484A471"}"},"total":22946},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7131652454873580319","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此书作者写得有点血腥，主人翁杀伐果断，似冷血动物，但内心颇有正义感，知道对错和关爱平民，书写虽有一些缺陷，但还值得一看。","text_exts":[{"e":18,"s":14,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740669088484A471%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227131652454873580319%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227075952796322761739%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660467324,"group_id":"7075952796322761739","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5Io86LzqHItazjBVMr2R2g=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"197538172114766","user_name":"红南京1954"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"197538172114766","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1663132258,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7075952796322761739","book_info":{"abstract":"【热血杀伐+无敌流+师姐+装逼爽文】
七年前，家族被灭，惨遭羞辱，七年后，叶君临携带诸位师父的通天本领强势归来！
和我比实力？我大师父武道之主，修为通神！
和我比医术？我二师父一代圣医，可起死人肉白骨！
和我比背景？我三师父一国国师，一言断人生死！
和我比人多？我四师父北凉战神，统领百万雄兵！
和我比有钱？我五师父商会之主，富可敌国！
和我比美人？我有七个倾国倾城的师姐，个个都很宠我！
新书《师弟，求求你饶了我吧！》欢迎阅读！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2425f032bdbca79930d85d94b9409f56","author":"小殇殇","author_id":"","book_id":"7075952796322761739","book_name":"徒儿，别祸害为师，去祸害你师姐","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"15.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":845,"name":"高手下山","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=845&name=高手下山&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7076047336530510370","read_count":"152215","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"8846885"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"4023","tags":"都市修真,都市,多女主,无脑爽,高手下山,神医","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a7eecbc8f8716e0803b5ff27ea254a69~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779250908&x-signature=YVo91GAUN235PkRCxJlVykjRvYU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"175551826366088","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.6580279e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211221485C6A170E54308484A471"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读21小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":318,"forwa
